description: Reduce Phase 1 risk from 0.5% to 0.35%. risk_pct is the 5th most important feature (0.1429) and appears in 4 of the top 10 interactions: dow_sinÃ—risk_pct (0.1505, #1 interaction), dow_cosÃ—risk_pct (0.1166), hour_sinÃ—risk_pct (0.0926), directionÃ—risk_pct (0.0660). Both discovered rules condition on risk_pct<0.50, and the winning rule (35.7% WR) requires low risk. The strong dow_sinÃ—risk_pct interaction (0.1505) suggests that on certain days, lower risk dramatically changes outcomes â€” likely because smaller position sizes avoid stop-hunting wicks on volatile days (Monday/Friday).
expected_improvement: Expect the win rate to approach the 35.7% seen in the SHAP rule (up from 30.1% baseline) as we move firmly into the risk_pct<0.50 regime where the model finds better outcomes. The trade-off is smaller individual wins, but for the prop firm challenge the primary constraint is max drawdown (10%) and daily drawdown (5%) â€” lower risk per trade directly reduces drawdown variance. Monte Carlo survival probability should increase significantly even if total return per trade decreases.
